title: ratify
description: hand picked mods with a focus on performance and semi vanilla experience
body:
# ratify

## lightweight but content heavy(ish) modpack with hand picked, currated mods. dont worry, its not just rats, thats only one of the mods:3

I dont own any of these mods, full credit to the developers

(requied by modrith): [effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective) | [blast](https://modrinth.com/mod/blast)
